data.summary: Exploratory evidence is insufficient to assert a hard requirement failure.
data.assessment: The evidence provided does not demonstrate that the system enforces deterministic insert/update failures when invalid ownership attempts are made. The linked use case specifies the need for foreign key constraints to prevent unauthorized access, but there is no evidence of such constraints being validated or enforced in the current saga run. This indicates a gap in the implementation of the requirement, as the necessary checks for ownership validation are absent.
gaps: No evidence of deterministic insert/update failures on invalid ownership attempts.

deterministicFollowUps.title: Add deterministic evidence contract
deterministicFollowUps.assertion: Define concrete endpoint calls and assertions that directly verify this requirement.
